datasets.name: ds_crs__repunc
queryLines:
SELECT
      `crs_version`,
      `transmittingcountry`,
      `receivingcountry`,
      `messagerefid`,
      `messagetypeindic`,
      `reportingperiod`,
      `reportingperiod_month`,
      `anio_fiscal`,
      `timestamp_val`,
      `status`,
      `in_reportingfi`,
      `name_reportingfi`,
      `addressfree_reportingfi`,
      `addressfix_reportingfi`,
      `addressfreefix_reportingfi`,
      `doctypeindic_reportingfi`,
      `docrefid_reportingfi`,
      `corrdocrefid_reportingfi`,
      `in_sponsor`,
      `name_sponsor`,
      `addressfree_sponsor`,
      `addressfix_sponsor`,
      `addressfreefix_sponsor`,
      `doctypeindic_sponsor`,
      `docrefid_sponsor`,
      `corrdocrefid_sponsor`,
      `doctypeindic_accountreport`,
      `docrefid_accountreport`,
      `corrdocrefid_accountreport`,
      `accountnumber_accountreport`,
      `accountnumbertype`,
      `undocumentedaccount`,
      `closedaccount`,
      `dormantaccount`,
      `tin_individual`,
      `name_individual`,
      `addressfree_individual`,
      `addressfix_individual`,
      `addressfreefix_individual`,
      `birthdate_individual`,
      `city_birthinfo_individual`,
      `countrycode_birthinfo_individual`,
      `in_organisation`,
      `name_organisation`,
      `addressfree_organisation`,
      `addressfix_organisation`,
      `addressfreefix_organisation`,
      `tin_controllingperson`,
      `name_controllingperson`,
      `addressfree_controllingperson`,
      `addressfix_controllingperson`,
      `addressfreefix_controllingperson`,
      `birthdate_controllingperson`,
      `city_birthinfo_controllingperson`,
      `countrycode_birthinfo_controllingperson`,
      `accountbalance`,
      `currcode_accountbalance`,
      `paymenttype_crs501`,
      `currcode_crs501`,
      `paymenttype_crs502`,
      `currcode_crs502`,
      `paymenttype_crs503`,
      `currcode_crs503`,
      `paymenttype_crs504`,
      `currcode_crs504`,
      `tipodecambiousd`,
      `accountbalanceusd`,
      `tipodecambiomxn`,
      `accountbalancemxn`,
      `rfc_localizado`,
      `marca_rfc`,
      `nombre_higienizado`,
      `domicilio_higienizado`,
      `idejecucion`,
      `operacion`,
      `name`,
      TRY_CAST(MEASURE(`filtermenu_crs`) AS DOUBLE) as `filtermenu_crs`,
      TRY_CAST(MEASURE(`registros_crs_reporteunc`) AS DOUBLE) as `registros_crs_reporteunc`,
      TRY_CAST(MEASURE(`crs_registros_global_repunc`) AS DOUBLE) as `crs_registros_global_repunc`
  FROM sat_reportes.default.mv_crs__repunc
  GROUP BY
      `crs_version`,
      `transmittingcountry`,
      `receivingcountry`,
      `messagerefid`,
      `messagetypeindic`,
      `reportingperiod`,
      `reportingperiod_month`,
      `anio_fiscal`,
      `timestamp_val`,
      `status`,
      `in_reportingfi`,
      `name_reportingfi`,
      `addressfree_reportingfi`,
      `addressfix_reportingfi`,
      `addressfreefix_reportingfi`,
      `doctypeindic_reportingfi`,
      `docrefid_reportingfi`,
      `corrdocrefid_reportingfi`,
      `in_sponsor`,
      `name_sponsor`,
      `addressfree_sponsor`,
      `addressfix_sponsor`,
      `addressfreefix_sponsor`,
      `doctypeindic_sponsor`,
      `docrefid_sponsor`,
      `corrdocrefid_sponsor`,
      `doctypeindic_accountreport`,
      `docrefid_accountreport`,
      `corrdocrefid_accountreport`,
      `accountnumber_accountreport`,
      `accountnumbertype`,
      `undocumentedaccount`,
      `closedaccount`,
      `dormantaccount`,
      `tin_individual`,
      `name_individual`,
      `addressfree_individual`,
      `addressfix_individual`,
      `addressfreefix_individual`,
      `birthdate_individual`,
      `city_birthinfo_individual`,
      `countrycode_birthinfo_individual`,
      `in_organisation`,
      `name_organisation`,
      `addressfree_organisation`,
      `addressfix_organisation`,
      `addressfreefix_organisation`,
      `tin_controllingperson`,
      `name_controllingperson`,
      `addressfree_controllingperson`,
      `addressfix_controllingperson`,
      `addressfreefix_controllingperson`,
      `birthdate_controllingperson`,
      `city_birthinfo_controllingperson`,
      `countrycode_birthinfo_controllingperson`,
      `accountbalance`,
      `currcode_accountbalance`,
      `paymenttype_crs501`,
      `currcode_crs501`,
      `paymenttype_crs502`,
      `currcode_crs502`,
      `paymenttype_crs503`,
      `currcode_crs503`,
      `paymenttype_crs504`,
      `currcode_crs504`,
      `tipodecambiousd`,
      `accountbalanceusd`,
      `tipodecambiomxn`,
      `accountbalancemxn`,
      `rfc_localizado`,
      `marca_rfc`,
      `nombre_higienizado`,
      `domicilio_higienizado`,
      `idejecucion`,
      `operacion`,
      `name`

datasets.name: ds_crs_sabana
queryLines:
SELECT
    `accountnumber_accountreport`,
    `accthholdertype_accountholder`,
    `anio_fiscal`,
    `birthdate_controllingperson`,
    `birthdate_individual`,
    `contact`,
    `messagerefid`,
    `messagetype`,
    `paymenttype_payment`,
    `receivingcountry`,
    `reportingperiod`,
    `timestamp`,
    `transmittingcountry`,
    `warning`,
    `fechainsercion`,
    `fechainsercion_month`,
    TRY_CAST(`idejecucion` AS STRING) as `idejecucion`,
    `nametype_individual`,
    `nametype_organisation`,
    `p_fechainsercion`,
    `p_fechainsercion_month`,
    `version`,
    `registros_crs_sabana`,
    `crs_registros_global_sabana`
  FROM (
    SELECT
      `accountnumber_accountreport`,
      `accthholdertype_accountholder`,
      `anio_fiscal`,
      `birthdate_controllingperson`,
      `birthdate_individual`,
      `contact`,
      `messagerefid`,
      `messagetype`,
      `paymenttype_payment`,
      `receivingcountry`,
      `reportingperiod`,
      `timestamp`,
      `transmittingcountry`,
      `warning`,
      `fechainsercion`,
      `fechainsercion_month`,
      `idejecucion`,
      `nametype_individual`,
      `nametype_organisation`,
      `p_fechainsercion`,
      `p_fechainsercion_month`,
      `version`,
      TRY_CAST(MEASURE(`registros_crs_sabana`) AS DOUBLE) as `registros_crs_sabana`,
      TRY_CAST(MEASURE(`crs_registros_global_sabana`) AS DOUBLE) as `crs_registros_global_sabana`
    FROM sat_reportes.default.mv_crs_sabana
    GROUP BY
      `accountnumber_accountreport`,
      `accthholdertype_accountholder`,
      `anio_fiscal`,
      `birthdate_controllingperson`,
      `birthdate_individual`,
      `contact`,
      `messagerefid`,
      `messagetype`,
      `paymenttype_payment`,
      `receivingcountry`,
      `reportingperiod`,
      `timestamp`,
      `transmittingcountry`,
      `warning`,
      `fechainsercion`,
      `fechainsercion_month`,
      `idejecucion`,
      `nametype_individual`,
      `nametype_organisation`,
      `p_fechainsercion`,
      `p_fechainsercion_month`,
      `version`

datasets.name: ds_fat_sabana
queryLines:
SELECT
    `accountclosed`,
    `accountnumber`,
    `accountnumbertype`,
    `acctholdertype`,
    `birthdate_individual`,
    `birthdate_substantialowner_individual`,
    `contact`,
    `corrmessagerefid`,
    `messagerefid`,
    `messagetype`,
    `payment`,
    `paymenttype`,
    `receivingcountry`,
    `reportingperiod`,
    `timestamp`,
    `transmittingcountry`,
    `warning`,
    `fechainsercion`,

    `nametype_individual`,
    `nametype_organisation`,
    `p_fechainsercion`,
    `version`,
    `registros_sabana`,
    `fat_registros_global_sabana`
  FROM (
    SELECT
      `accountclosed`,
      `accountnumber`,
      `accountnumbertype`,
      `acctholdertype`,
      `birthdate_individual`,
      `birthdate_substantialowner_individual`,
      `contact`,
      `corrmessagerefid`,
      `messagerefid`,
      `messagetype`,
      `payment`,
      `paymenttype`,
      `receivingcountry`,
      `reportingperiod`,
      `timestamp`,
      `transmittingcountry`,
      `warning`,
      `fechainsercion`,
      `idejecucion`,
      `nametype_individual`,
      `nametype_organisation`,
      `p_fechainsercion`,
      `version`,
      TRY_CAST(MEASURE(`registros_sabana`) AS DOUBLE) as `registros_sabana`,

    FROM sat_reportes.default.mv_fat_sabana
    GROUP BY
